headline: Is Comfort Systems Scaling Modular Capacity for the Data Center Boom?
summary: FIX is expanding modular capacity to meet late-cycle data center demand, targeting 4M sq ft by 2026 as backlog stretches revenue into 2027-2028.

raw.headline: Is Comfort Systems Scaling Modular Capacity for the Data Center Boom?
raw.summary: FIX is expanding modular capacity to meet late-cycle data center demand, targeting 4M sq ft by 2026 as backlog stretches revenue into 2027-2028.

headline: Should You Buy FIX After a 6-Month Surge and Record Backlog?
summary: FIX has surged for six months after a blowout quarter and record $11.94B backlog, but with shares near a high-30s forward P/E, future gains hinge on execution.

raw.headline: Should You Buy FIX After a 6-Month Surge and Record Backlog?
raw.summary: FIX has surged for six months after a blowout quarter and record $11.94B backlog, but with shares near a high-30s forward P/E, future gains hinge on execution.

headline: MasTec's Backlog Up by $4.7B: Sign of Sustained Infrastructure Demand?
summary: MTZ's backlog jumps to $18.96B. Does this surge signal a sustained infrastructure supercycle across energy, grid and data centers?

headline: UBS Maintains Buy on EMCOR Group, Raises Price Target to $945
summary: UBS  analyst Avinatan Jaroslawicz   maintains EMCOR Group (NYSE:EME) with a Buy and raises the price target from $900 to $945.
